title: Fine Wire Mesh Kitchen Sieve Set 7,12,18cm with Rim - Upgraded Verison Stainless Steel Food Strainer & Sieve, Ideal for Straining Quinoa Juice Tea Jams Flour Sugar
features: 【Different Purpose Use】: The Strainers will be a daily tool that will help you serve up delightful treats. 3 different size (7", 4.72" and 3") for different purposes, ideal for straining quinoa,juice, tea, pastas, jams, sifting flour, sugar,soup and more.
【Fine Mesh Strainer】: Professional quality, sturdy, stainless steel, no rust, stylish design. A refined mesh will ensure only the finest grains of flour get through and no lumps.
【Easy to Store】: The robust frame has two over hanging hooks that allow you to place the sieve over a bowl or pan. And the convenient double handle provides a secure grip.

【High-quality Food-grade Material and Cleaning Tip】: The Premium Quality Food Strainer & Sieve is crafted from food-grade material, please rest assured use. Dishwasher safe, very easy to hand clean. Washing in warm soapy water is okey.

【Great After-sales Service】: All our products go through rigorous inspection and testing to ensure our customers receive a quality kitchen sieve. Shop with complete confidence as you have a full 180-days to check out the Wellehomi Mesh Strainer. We certain that you're going to love it.
description: Product Description Set of 3 in Multiple Sizes Small Size: 2.64 inch wide - used for straining tea, coffee,squeezing lemons,poaching eggs or sifting flour, sugar, spices, etc. Medium Size: 4.64 inch wide - used to sift thick, clumpy dry ingredients such as baby cereals, ground oatmeal, salt, spices and more. Large Size: 6.92 inch wide - used to sift many dry ingredients such as confectioner's icing, cocoa powder, ground coffee beans, quinoa, spaghetti or washing fruits, and vegetables Clean and Care Instructions: Dishwasher safe Please rinse the kitchen sieve in warm water immediately after each use, and keep them clean and dry before store. 13Pcs Round Cookie Cutter Pastry Cutters 34Pcs Piping Bags and Nozzles Set Wellehomi Citrus Lemon Zester Lemon Zester Cheese Grater 3 Kitchen Graters Set Chalkboard Labels 154Pcs Cheese Grater with Container Graters for Kitchen with Double Size Graters Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 432 4.7 out of 5 stars 13 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,434 — 4.5 out of 5 stars 301 — Price £7.55 £ 7 . 55 — no data £6.79 £ 6 . 79 — no data — no data — no data
